name: cause
title: Cause
description: A trust-first theme for nonprofits and charities. The signature is the mission hero: one human photograph, one impact number set huge in warm ochre, one verb — then a donate button. Deep teal on white, generous space, zero decoration; every element is content.

tokens.--font-display: headings, the site title, and the impact number
tokens.--text-s: meta text — dates, captions, the colophon
tokens.--text-impact: the hero impact number (the one loud thing)
tokens.--color-accent: deep teal — links, the donate button, focus rings
tokens.--color-accent-ink: text set on the teal donate button
tokens.--color-number: warm ochre — reserved for the impact number, nothing else
tokens.--color-panel: quiet tinted panels — get-involved block, code, tables
tokens.--color-photo: the field behind the hero photograph (and its empty slot)
tokens.--radius: corner rounding — 6px, rounded but not bubbly
tokens.--tap-target: minimum height of buttons and tap targets
